name: FM Scanner
description: Live FM radio receiver with RDS display, frequency history, presets, and band scan. Streams audio from a remote site's RTL-SDR dongle (role=scanner) to the browser in real time.

name: Web SDR
description: Browser-based software defined radio with scrolling waterfall display. Tune any frequency within the capture bandwidth. WFM, NFM, and AM demodulation modes. Requires an RTL-SDR dongle on the client machine.

name: DAB Scanner
description: DAB digital radio browser. Scans all Band III channels to discover services and streams selected services as MP3 audio. Displays DLS scrolling text. Raspberry Pi supported. Requires welle-cli and ffmpeg on the client machine.

name: Logger
description: Compliance logger for continuous 24/7 recording of all monitored streams. Hub mode aggregates recordings from all connected sites — browse timelines, play audio, and export segments with mark in/out. Supports now-playing metadata from Planet Radio, Triton, or any JSON API. Requires ffmpeg.

name: Meter Wall
description: Full-screen audio meter wall showing live PPM-style level bars for every monitored stream across all connected sites. Peak hold, LUFS readout, alert flash, RDS/DLS now-playing, site grouping, and kiosk mode. Stereo L/R bars at 150 ms update rate.

name: Zetta Integration
description: RCS Zetta broadcast automation integration. Multi-instance SOAP monitor — shows live sequencer state per station: mode (Auto/Manual/Voice Track), status (PLAYING/QUEUED/NEXT), GAP, ETM, now-playing title/artist/cart/category, and upcoming queue. Detects commercial/spot blocks in real time. Per-station broadcast chain assignment with live status chips on the Broadcast Chains page. Includes a SOAP debug explorer. Requires zeep.

name: Morning Report
description: Daily morning briefing auto-generated at 06:00 covering the previous day. Plain-English fault summary, per-chain health table with on-air %, traffic-light trend pills, hourly fault heatmap, and stream quality summary. Hub-only.

name: Signal Path Latency
description: Signal path latency tracking for broadcast chains. Polls all connected sites for comparator delay measurements, stores 90 days of history, and displays per-comparator sparklines with stable/drifting/alert badges. Hub-only.

name: Codec Monitor
description: Real-time connection monitor for broadcast contribution codecs — Comrex ACCESS/BRIC-Link, Tieline Gateway/ViA, Prodys Quantum ST, and APT/WorldCast Quantum. Polls via HTTP scraping or SNMP and fires CODEC_FAULT/RECOVERY alerts. Runs on hub and client nodes.

name: Push Server
description: Centralised push notification server for iOS and Android. Holds APNs and FCM credentials and delivers notifications on behalf of any SignalScope installation that points its Push Server URL here. Hub-only.

name: Wallboard
description: TV-optimised broadcast wallboard with live chain status cards, station logos, PPM-style level meters, alert ticker, and full customisation. Upload logos per chain, select which streams to display, toggle LUFS/now-playing/hero banner. Gradient avatars, health bars, zone-coloured meters at 150 ms update rate. Hub-only.

name: PTP Clock
description: Full-screen GPS-accurate wall clock for broadcast studios. Digital and analog modes, live PTP sync status, offset and jitter display, custom branding via URL parameter.

name: Icecast Streaming
description: Manage Icecast2 streaming servers on client nodes. Re-streams any monitored input to Icecast2. Hub overview shows live listener counts and stream status from all connected sites. Requires ffmpeg; Icecast2 installed separately.

name: Listener
description: Live stream listener for presenters and producers. Station cards with live level meters and one-tap audio playback. Designed for non-technical users — auto-reconnects, animated equalizer, volume control, mobile-friendly. Hub-only.

name: Producer View
description: Simplified hub view for producers and presenters. Station status cards with live levels and plain-English chain fault history. Users assigned the Producer role go directly here on login. Hub-only.

name: AzuraCast
description: AzuraCast web radio integration. Live now-playing data, listener counts, and station health across all connected sites. Fires AZURACAST_FAULT/RECOVERY alerts and optionally cross-references with SignalScope silence detection.

name: IP Link
description: Browser-based IP codec and SIP softphone. WebRTC rooms with shareable talent URLs — low-latency Opus audio, bidirectional IFB, live level meters. Permanent rooms support server-side routing with Livewire/AES67 multicast output. Server-side SIP registration (hub holds multiple SIP accounts permanently — no browser needed). Requires aiortc, av, and numpy for server-side WebRTC.

name: Sync Capture
description: Multi-site synchronized audio capture. Select inputs from any connected sites, set a duration, and capture — the hub timestamps the command and each client grabs its rolling buffer at the same moment. All clips presented together with inline players, EBU R128 analysis, waveforms, and DAW session export (REAPER/Audition). Hub-only.

name: Studio Board
description: Large-format studio display for outside broadcast studios. Shows presenter/show info, now playing, live level meters, mic live status, chain health, and Zetta automation queue. Fully configurable admin page for assigning chains, inputs, Planet Radio feeds, Zetta stations, and show artwork per studio. REST API for mic live and station assignment from automation systems. Chain colour takeover, smooth RAF meters, free-studio messaging. Bauer branded. Hub-only.
